title: Hierarchical task analysis and SHERPA analysis of Supraglottic Jet Ventilation in Elective Laryngeal Surgery
author: Ní Choileáin, Orna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This file is the hierarchical task analysis, and systematic human error reduction and prediction approach (SHERPA) of an anaethetic procedure called supraglottic jet ventilation.
steps_raw: This file is the hierarchical task analysis, and systematic human error reduction and prediction approach (SHERPA) of an anaethetic procedure called supraglottic jet ventilation.
